name: Promotion of environmental and/or social characteristics

regulatory_anchors.article: Annex II (Article 8 pre-contractual template); Annex III (Article 9 pre-contractual template)

summary: Tests whether the product (under PB's review framing: the project the developer is bringing to market) demonstrably promotes environmental and/or social characteristics, in line with the SFDR Article 8 framing. Evidence must be specific: a named E/S characteristic, the mechanism by which the project advances it, and the governance arrangement that ensures the characteristic is maintained over the product life.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), the Article 8 'E/S characteristics' framing is expected to be subsumed into a new category regime. PB Art 8/Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.3 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
